Lumify
Table of Contents

Class WorkspaceMember

Namespace
lumify.api.Models.EF
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Join entity linking a User to a Workspace with a role. A removed membership is soft-deleted via DeletedAt.

public class WorkspaceMember
Inheritance
object
WorkspaceMember

Properties

CreatedAt

Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

public string CreatedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

DeletedAt

Soft-delete timestamp (ISO-8601 string); null while the membership is active.

public string? DeletedAt { get; set; }

Property Value

string

ID

Primary key (GUID string).

public string ID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Role

Membership role: 1 = Owner, 2 = Admin, 3 = User.

public int Role { get; set; }

Property Value

int

User

The member user.

public virtual User User { get; set; }

Property Value

User

UserID

The member user.

public string UserID { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Workspace

The workspace.

public virtual Workspace Workspace { get; set; }

Property Value

Workspace

WorkspaceID

The workspace this membership belongs to.

public string WorkspaceID { get; set; }

Property Value

string
